title: adicea mongolica
intro: Adicea mongolica, also known as Mongolian wormwood or Mongolian artemisia, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Mongolia and China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Adicea mongolica are said to include relief from fever, colds, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
